title: PewMod
body:
## Pew Mod
Pew Mod adds a simple, custom passive mob named _Pew_ to your Minecraft world. Pew is a small, egg-shaped creature with a custom spawn egg and subtle idle animations. Designed for light-hearted fun, Pew periodically drops cocoa beans to simulate a humorous natural behavior.

**Features:**
- A custom passive entity called Pew
- Unique spawn egg with custom textures
- Light idle and movement animations
- Random cocoa bean drops to simulate environmental interaction

This mod is great for players looking to add quirky, fun companions to their world without changing core gameplay mechanics. Pew fits into both survival and creative environments and works seamlessly with other content mods.

## Usage Instructions
- 🥚 Use the /summon pewmod:pew command or place the Pew Spawn Egg from the Creative inventory under the Spawn Eggs tab.
- 💩 Droppings (cocoa beans) happen periodically — don't ask why.

![Inventory_SpawnEgg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a04b45876799f5344144edb66ab1bec7ce585ce5_0.webp)

![Pew pewpew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dca4e7c1ddc31d9ab0ad28a1f81c1035a7d3c70.png)

## Compatibility Notes
- ✅ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21
- 🧵 Requires Fabric API
- ❌ Not compatible with Forge (Fabric only)
